content.review_text: Very disappointing service. The staff was rude and the wait time was over 45 minutes. Would not recommend.
content.suggested_response: Dear Rajesh, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologise for the experience you had — this is not the standard we hold ourselves to. We'd love to make this right; please reach out to us at support@lifecircle.in and we'll ensure your next visit exceeds expectations.

mainEntity.name: How many sessions do I need?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most clients see meaningful progress within 6–8 sessions. We recommend starting with a 3-month commitment for lasting change.
